subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto the Leaf of the Lote-Tree, a grace from Our presence and a mercy from Us. Blessed is he who heareth and attaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا للورقه السدره فضلا من عندنا و رحمه من لدنا طوبی لمن سمع و فاز
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement
